description: Complete the home energy tracking spreadsheet. Calculate monthly kWh usage using meter reading differences, costs using the formula (kWh × rate + base fee), year-over-year percentage changes, and summary statistics. Save the updated spreadsheet to /home/ga/Documents/energy_tracking.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: Add formulas to calculate monthly electricity usage, costs, and year-over-year comparisons in the energy tracking spreadsheet. Calculate kWh used (current reading minus previous), cost (kWh times rate plus base fee), and percentage change from last year.
